settings.directMapClick.label: Right-click on tracked map marker (KBM)
settings.directMapClick.desc: Right-click directly on a tracked map marker (any kind — quests, vendors, NCPDs, custom waypoints) to untrack it.
settings.directMapPad.label: Track button on tracked map marker (Gamepad)
settings.directMapPad.desc: Press the gamepad track button on a tracked map marker (any kind) to untrack it.
settings.modifierKbmKey.label: Untrack-anywhere key (KBM)
settings.modifierKbmKey.desc: Click the field and press any key to bind. While this key is held, right-clicking anywhere — gameplay, inventory, journal, world map — toggles quest tracking. Default: Left Shift.
settings.enableModifierKbm.label: Enable KBM untrack-anywhere
settings.enableModifierKbm.desc: Master switch for the KBM 'hold key + right-click' path.
settings.modifierPadKey.label: Untrack key (Gamepad)
settings.modifierPadKey.desc: Click the field and press any gamepad button to bind. ON FOOT: long-press this button to toggle quest tracking. IN VEHICLE: quick-tap this button to toggle quest tracking (long-press is reserved for vanilla's look-behind camera). Default: Right Stick click (R3).
settings.enableLongPressPad.label: Enable gamepad untrack
settings.enableLongPressPad.desc: Master switch for the gamepad untrack key (both on-foot long-press and in-vehicle quick-tap behaviors).
settings.longPressThresholdMs.label: Press threshold (ms)
settings.longPressThresholdMs.desc: On foot: how long the button must be HELD to fire. In vehicle: how short the press must be (quick tap) to fire. Lower = snappier on foot but harder to quick-tap in vehicle. Higher = the opposite. 500 is balanced.
settings.preventMainQuestRetrack.label: Prevent main quest auto-retrack
settings.preventMainQuestRetrack.desc: If you've manually untracked a main quest objective, the game will not silently re-track it.
settings.preventFixerRewardAutotrack.des: Stops the game from auto-tracking the 'come pick up your reward' objective from completed Fixer gigs.
settings.playFeedbackSounds.label: Play feedback sounds on toggle
settings.playFeedbackSounds.desc: Plays a confirmation sound when you toggle tracking.
settings.feedbackSoundName.label: Feedback sound
settings.feedbackSoundName.desc: Pick the gameplay sound played when toggling. The menu sound is fixed (uses the vanilla map-pin sounds).
settings.feedbackSoundTest.label: Test feedback sound
settings.feedbackSoundTest.desc: Play the currently selected sound once.
settings.languageOverride.label: Language override
settings.languageOverride.desc: Force a specific UI language instead of auto-detecting from the game. Leave blank to use the game's language. Restart the game to apply.
settings.showSaveListUntrackedLabel.desc: When a save was made with no tracked quest, the load/save menu will show 'Untracked' instead of leaving the field blank.
